---
title: "Edan Spector"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: GIT-pfp.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edan-spector-31a0b5302/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/espector24
---

Edan Spector is a full time students at California State University Monterey Bay with a Marine Science Major and a Statistics Minor.

## Education

California State University -- Monterey Bay \| Monterey, CA B.S. in Marine Science \| expected graduation Dec 2026

## Experience

Moss Landing Marine Laboratories \| Research Intern \| Sept 2025 - Present

CSUMB \| Student Instructional Leader -- BIO 211 \| Jan 2025 - Present

California Killer Whale Project \| Research Intern \| Sept 2024 - Dec 2024

CSUMB \| Instructional Student Assistant -- STAT 250 \| Aug 2024 - Dec 2025

## Final Portfolio Item

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```


```{r}
#| include: false
fish1 <- read.csv("data-raw/SD001--2025.csv")
mortality <- read.csv("data-raw/CTE002-2025.csv")
fish2 <-read.csv("data-raw/SD001-CALIFORNIA-2025.csv")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
fish1 <- fish1 |> 
  clean_names()
fish2 <- fish2 |> 
  clean_names()

fish1_clean <- fish1 |> 
  select(recfin_imputed_weight_kg, recfin_length_mm, species_name) |> 
  mutate(ratio = recfin_imputed_weight_kg/recfin_length_mm) |> 
  drop_na()

fish2_clean <- fish2 |> 
  select(recfin_imputed_weight_kg, recfin_length_mm, species_name) |> 
  mutate(ratio = recfin_imputed_weight_kg/recfin_length_mm) |> 
  drop_na()
species_count <- fish2_clean 
  

all <- bind_rows(fish1_clean, fish2_clean)

species_count <- all |> 
  count(species_name, name = "count")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
all |> 
  join_by(mortality, species_name == "species")
```

```{r}
species_count |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = reorder(species_name, count), y= count,
                       fill = species_name)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Fish Species",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Species Name")
```
